title: Skill manifest (skill.json)
description: Canonical shape for skills/<name>/skill.json and the reserved skills/.experimental/<name>/skill.json lane. Per-skill scripts assert name match via jq after schema validation passes.

internal.description: When true, the skill is hidden from catalog listings unless INSTALL_INTERNAL_SKILLS=1 (e.g. example-minimal).

family.description: Catalog family the skill belongs to. Single source of truth for README catalog grouping; consumed by scripts/build-catalog.py. Required on every published (non-internal) skill.

function.description: Where the skill sits in the audit/design matrix. 'singleton' for skills with no paired counterpart. Consumed by scripts/build-catalog.py.

catalog_order.description: Optional explicit ordering within a family (lower first); skills without it sort by name after ordered ones.

catalog_summary.description: One-line markdown summary rendered as the skill's bullet in the generated README catalog. Required on every published (non-internal) skill.
